free_text: Data (el.DA, tot.c-s, inl.DA for Cd isotopes) of this
experiment were used in J.Yad.Fiz.,58,216,1994 for
0.4-2.-MeV neutrons interaction with Cd and Sn even
isotopes and the generalized optical model.
El.cs for Sn isotopes at 0.93,1.45,1.96 MeV,
Inl.cs for Sn isotopes at 1.96 MeV,
El.cs for Cd and Sn isotopes at 0.4,0.6,0.8,1.06 MeV;
Stilbene crystal  with FEU-30 at 2.2 m distance.
Stilbene crystal  with FEU-110 at 2.m distance.
Elastic dif.c-s were defined by normalization to
Inelastic dif. c-s were defined by (n,p)-scattering
Title was corrected as given in J.Yad.Fiz.,50,(12),1531
Proc. 5th All Union Conf.on Neutron Phys.,Kiev,15-19
Sep 1980, v.1, p.309,1980 was moved in REL-REF.
BIB and COMMON information was added.
